name: send_app_control
description: Send an app control request to launch an application. If app_id is provided, launches that specific app (explicit intent). If app_id is omitted, uses operation/URI/MIME to find and launch the best matching app (implicit intent). At least one of app_id or operation must be provided.

app_id.description: The application ID to launch (e.g. 'org.tizen.setting'). If provided, the app is launched directly.

operation.description: The operation for the app control (e.g. 'http://tizen.org/appcontrol/operation/view'). Used for implicit intent matching when app_id is not specified.

extra_data.description: Optional key-value pairs to pass as extra data
